Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: This module outline covers the core concepts of graph data structures—including definitions of vertices and edges, directed vs. undirected graphs, adjacency matrix and adjacency list representations, and graph traversal algorithms—serving as a navigational guide for learners and instructors to see the full scope of topics in the module.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: A topic outline for the Graphs module that defines core graph concepts—vertices, edges, structure, representation, and traversal—serving as a navigational overview for learners to understand what will be covered and for instructors to see the module's scope.
